title: House Democrats to investigate DOJ's handling of missing Epstein files related to Trump
description: An NPR investigation has found that the public database of Epstein files is missing dozens of pages related to sexual abuse accusations against President Trump.
content: An NPR investigation has found that the public database of Epstein files is missing dozens of pages related to sexual abuse accusations against President Trump.
